This family is a subfamily within the large family Gekkonidae, commonly known as the gecko family. The Stigmatodactylidae is a relatively small family and is endemic to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. It primarily consists of small, nocturnal geckos with distinctive features. The Stigmatodactylidae family is part of the larger infraorder Gekkota, which includes all geckos.
